prompt: You are given an image of a vehicle and an audio recording of car diagnostics. Return true if car is torn according to image and has bad ignition according to audio

params._note: drop-only: image confident_neg dropped; audio fully BQ; do not trust dase POS for AND

positive: vehicle with torn or ripped material
image of a car with tear damage
negative: a vehicle without tears or rips

positive: audio of a car with bad ignition
ignition starting problem in a car

cascade_form: Drop-only F: dase image NEG drops pairs (image clearly not torn) → BQ verbatim AI.IF(image, audio) on remaining; cascade_yes = bq_yes_on_kept

calibration.method: AI.GENERATE_BOOL multimodal pair (image, audio, Q9 prompt) + thinking_budget=0

baseline.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.car_id
FROM cars_dataset.car_mm as x, cars_dataset.cars AS p, cars_dataset.audio_mm as a
WHERE p.car_id = x.car_id AND p.car_id = a.car_id
  AND AI.IF(
    ('You are given an image of a vehicle and an audio recording of car diagnostics. Return true if car is torn according to image and has bad ignition according to audio.', x.image, a.image),
    connection_id => 'us.connection',
    endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')

cascade.method: Drop-only F: image dase NEG drops pairs; BQ AI.IF combined on remaining

stage2_run.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.car_id
    FROM cars_dataset.car_mm AS x, cars_dataset.cars AS p, cars_dataset.audio_mm AS a
    WHERE p.car_id = x.car_id AND p.car_id = a.car_id
      AND p.car_id IN UNNEST(@ids)
      AND AI.IF(
        ('You are given an image of a vehicle and an audio recording of car diagnostics. Return true if car is torn according to image and has bad ignition according to audio.', x.image, a.image),
        connection_id => 'us.connection',
        endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')
